title: AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE SEAT OF GOVERNMENT OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF KAYAN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, FROM ITS PRESENT SITE TO THE SITE OF THE BARRIO OF TADIAN IN THE SAME MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4846 / 53 OG No. 23, 8498 (December 15, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2039, June 23, 1957 ]

AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE SEAT OF GOVERNMENT OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF KAYAN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, FROM ITS PRESENT SITE TO THE SITE OF THE BARRIO OF TADIAN IN THE SAME MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The seat of government of the Municipality of Kayan, Mountain Province, is transferred to the site of the barrio of Tadian in the same municipality.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive Approval, June 23, 1957.
